title: Cinematography Composition Analysis Fashion Editorial AI
sourceTitle: Cinematography Composition Analysis Fashion Editorial AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Cinematic fashion editorial bedroom photograph presented as a film-school composition analysis frame around adult female model sitting on the left edge of a white bed in a structured cream robe over full-coverage lounge set, face turned toward the window with a quiet inward. Subject: adult female model sitting on the left edge of a white bed in a structured cream robe over full-coverage lounge set, face turned toward the window with a quiet inward is the main figure, placed on the left third and balanced against the bright window mass inside a minimal cream bedroom with modest editorial wardrobe styling with linen bedding, tall sheer curtains, pale wall panels and a low morning haze. Scene: a minimal cream bedroom with modest editorial wardrobe styling with linen bedding, tall sheer curtains, pale wall panels and a low morning haze with warm hazy morning atmosphere, sheer curtains, white bedding, cream wall panels, and overexposed daylight forming the right-side luminous mass. Composition: Fixed 16:9 widescreen analysis layout: model aligned to the left rule-of-thirds grid line, bright curtain/window mass aligned on the right third, bed and wall lines leading toward the focus point, and clean educational overlay graphics above the photograph. Signature Elements: Thin green rule-of-thirds grid, red vertical body-alignment line, green circular focus markers around waist/hip, face, and bright curtain mass, yellow eye-trace arrows, red leading-line arrows, cyan fill-light arrow, and film-school composition annotation logic. Style: Luxury fashion editorial photography with soft cinematic realism, subtle film grain, shallow depth of field, elegant minimal bedroom styling, and visible cinematography breakdown overlay. Color Palette: Warm beige, cream, white bedding, pale wall panels, soft skin tones, thin green grid lines, red alignment and leading-line arrows, yellow eye-trace arrows, cyan fill-light arrow, and controlled high-contrast daylight. Lighting: Strong natural window light from the right side, high contrast on face and body silhouette, subtle secondary fill from the left, warm morning haze, soft bloom near curtains, and realistic skin texture. Camera: 35mm lens, medium-wide framing, eye-level camera angle, 16:9 cinematic widescreen crop. Typography: Clean English educational labels placed around the frame: Body aligned on the grid of thirds; High contrast Focus Point 2; Eye Trace; Focus Point 3; High contrast Focus Point 1; Secondary light source for dark parts; Lines lead to the main focus point; The white mass is aligned on the grid of thirds to balance the left side of the image. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
